response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Report the two named records in alphabetical order, then report the dependent action or comparison.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Cancel Benefits renewal review only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and tentative status.

arguments.body: Benefits renewal review was cancelled after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Benefits renewal review

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record cal-681 changes from tentative to cancelled with the stated reason.
Record cal-281 and distractor cal-1081 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to scheduling desk, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Launch readiness briefing in Denver HQ and Benefits renewal review in Chicago Office with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Benefits renewal review is still tentative, cancel only Benefits renewal review, with reason "Organizer withdrew the tentative meeting". Leave Launch readiness briefing unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify scheduling desk with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. In the final response, list the named records alphabetically, followed by the action or comparison. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Benefits renewal review was cancelled after status verification.
